question: What is the main difficulty in interpreting this sales chart from 1924 to 2024?

options.A: The very small size of the chart makes it hard to read exact values and subtle changes over the decades.
options.B: The chart clearly shows that sales declined only from 1970 to 1980.
options.C: The chart clearly indicates that sales increased in every single decade.
options.D: The chart shows that sales were identical in all years.

explanation: The data shows two declines: 1955-1965 and 1975-1985. Small text can make it difficult to see both dips.
